name: Red Lentil Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Red lentils; sorted and rinsed
1 green bell pepper; seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart crockpot, combine lentils, onion, celery, green bell pepper, and garlic.
2. Add water and bouillon cubes, stirring to break apart lentils.
3. Stir in chili powder, paprika, bay leaf, and black pepper.
4. Cover and cook on High for 1 hour.
5. Reduce heat to low and cook an additional 6 to 8 hours or until lentils are tender.
6. Raise the heat to High, stir in spaghetti sauce, and continue cooking for 10 to 15 minutes longer.
7. If the spaghetti sauce seems acidic, add optional sugar.
8. Remove and discard the bay leaf.
